_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in Pre-A1/020 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Tom; computer plays Mia. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 020 · The Little Duck

routes.meaning: Tom says the duck is yellow and small.
examples: It is a little yellow duck.
routes.hint: Describe the duck: “It is yellow and small.”

routes.meaning: Tom reacts to the cute duck.
routes.hint: You can describe it — “It is yellow and small.” — or say “It is so cute!”

partial.message: Tell Mia about the duck: “It is yellow and small.”

off_topic.message: Mia sees a little duck. Say “It is yellow and small.”

npc.text: Yes, it is cute! It is yellow and small too.

routes.meaning: Tom agrees and looks at the duck.
routes.hint: Look with Mia: “Yes, it is small!”

partial.message: Agree with Mia: “Yes, it is yellow and small.”

off_topic.message: The duck is little. Say “Yes, it is small!”

routes.meaning: Tom says the duck swims in the pond.
examples: The duck swims in the pond.
routes.hint: Say where it swims: “It swims in the pond.”

routes.meaning: Tom is amazed the duck can swim.
routes.hint: You can say “It swims in the pond.” or “Wow, it swims!”

partial.message: Where does the duck swim? Say “It swims in the pond.”

off_topic.message: The duck can swim. Try “It swims in the pond.”

learning_objective: Say what sound the duck makes

routes.meaning: Tom says the duck says quack.
routes.hint: Say the duck's sound: “The duck says quack.”
You can say “The duck says quack.” or “Quack, quack!”

partial.message: What does the duck say? Try “The duck says quack.”

off_topic.message: The duck goes quack! Say “The duck says quack.”

learning_objective: Say what the duck can do

routes.meaning: Tom says the duck can flap its wings.
examples: The duck can flap its wings.
routes.hint: Say what it can do: “It can flap its wings.”
You can say “It can flap its wings.” or “Two wings!”

partial.message: What can the duck do? Try “It can flap its wings.”

off_topic.message: The duck has two wings. Say “It can flap its wings.”

learning_objective: Agree and share what you like

routes.hint: You can say “Me too!” or “I love the duck!”

partial.message: Mia likes the duck. Say “Me too!”

off_topic.message: Do you like the little duck? Say “Me too!”

npc.text: The little duck is happy. Quack, quack!
